steps.title: Use the exponent rule
steps.content:
A power of $\frac{1}{2}$ means a square root:
$$
u^{1/2}=\sqrt{u}
$$

steps.title: Apply it to the product
steps.content: Here the entire product $147y$ is the base, so the square root covers the full product: $$ (147y)^{1/2}=\sqrt{147y} $$ The answer is C.
